# Vendored stremio-web

This folder tracks a pinned upstream snapshot used by the Android/TV shell integration.

- Upstream repository: `https://github.com/Stremio/stremio-web.git`
- Pinned metadata: `vendor/stremio-web/VENDOR_METADATA.json`
- Synced source location: `vendor/stremio-web/source`

Use `scripts/sync-upstream-stremio-web.ps1` to update this snapshot.
